text: Linux is an open-source, Unix-like operating system kernel created by Linus Torvalds in 1991

Combined with GNU utilities, it forms the GNU/Linux operating system that powers 100% of the TOP500 supercomputers, 96.3% of the top 1 million web servers, all Android devices , and the majority of cloud infrastructure
Linux is licensed under GPLv2 and maintained by thousands of contributors worldwide, with Linus Torvalds remaining the principal maintainer as of 2026
